How many flights are currently delayed?
How many rows are in flight_legs?
_note: This one is a stable fact (verified earlier in our conversation) - safe to use an exact value since total row count won't change from normal operational activity, only from data loads. Note: uses expected_field_value, not expected_row_count, because COUNT(*) returns ONE row containing the count - expected_row_count would check the wrong thing here. Use expected_row_count/min/max only for questions that return a list of items; use expected_field_value for aggregate answers (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX).
